title: Anti Slur Guard
description: AntiSlurGuard is a plugin that discreetly blocks nicknames and messages from players that violate external rules, such as "hateful slurs." It has multiple settings and is ideal for streamers!
body:
![_](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7de2b079553d104c5148d9bda369b8dd7240aa6.png)

# AntiSlurGuard

AntiSlurGuard is a smart and stealthy chat filter for servers that blocks nicknames and chat messages containing banned words.  
It runs quietly in the background, tracks violations, and applies silent punishments or admin notifications based on your settings.  
Works best with EssentialsX.

## Features

• Nickname and chat message filtering for hateful slurs, checked before login and during gameplay.  
• Advanced text normalization: case-insensitivity, diacritics removal, leetspeak handling, Cyrillic-to-Latin conversion (ICU4J), noise removal, repeat collapsing, and more.  
• Exception list — phrases that should never be blocked, even if they match generated variants.  
• Admin notifications for chat violations, individually configurable via `/asg notify`.  
• Anti-spam filter with per-player slowmode, plus alerts to moderators.  
• Scheduled chat announcements with clickable links and hover text.  
• Violation logs with full original messages, saved per player for moderation review.  
• Player violation tracking with automatic permanent ban upon reaching a set limit.

Everything is described in more
